tool.title: Video Downloader
tool.description: Supports M3U8/HLS, MP4, and other video formats with range download, streaming, AES decryption, MP4 conversion

parse.directVideoDetected: {format} video detected, click download to start
parse.variantsDetected: Detected {count} quality levels, highest bitrate selected by default
parse.invalidLink: Incorrect URL, please check if the link is valid
parse.selectVariant: Multiple quality levels detected, please select:
parse.continueSelect: Please continue to select a quality level
parse.variantFailed: Failed to parse selected quality, please retry
parse.emptyResource: Resource is empty, please check if the link is valid
parse.encryptedError: Video is encrypted and cannot be downloaded

download.directFailed: Download failed, please check the URL and try again
download.streamTooltip: Download and save simultaneously, solves memory issues for large files
download.mp4Failed: MP4 conversion failed, using original TS format
download.streamSaverNotLoaded: StreamSaver not loaded, streaming download unavailable
download.forceDownloadSuccess: Browser download triggered for existing segments

progress.title: Download Progress
progress.retryHint: Red blocks can be clicked to retry - auto-retry every 2 seconds

empty.title: No download tasks
empty.description: Enter a video URL and click Parse to start
empty.hint: Supports M3U8/HLS, MP4, and other video formats
